metadata.notes: Adapted from Kubernetes StatefulSet docs. Level-1 sobreposição: OnDelete update strategy sobreposiçãos automatic RollingUpdate behavior.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

provenance.adaptation_method: Parafraseado e condensado em um cenário sintético, preservando o padrão relacional necessário para a avaliação do benchmark. O caso não substitui o documento-fonte.
provenance.professional_guidance_warning: Artefato apenas para avaliação; não use como aconselhamento jurídico, tributário, clínico, de operações em nuvem, imigração ou política institucional.

representations.raw:
StatefulSet update note.

Seção A. RollingUpdate. The default StatefulSet update strategy performs automated rolling updates when the Pod template mudanças.

Seção B. OnDelete. Quando a StatefulSet uses the OnDelete update strategy, the controller does not automatically update existing Pods after a template mudança. Users deve manually delete Pods for the controller to recreate them from the updated template.
representations.annotated:
StatefulSet update note.

<rule id="R1">Seção A. RollingUpdate. The default StatefulSet update strategy performs automated rolling updates when the Pod template mudanças.</rule>

<override id="O1" overrides="R1" condition="updateStrategy.type == OnDelete">Seção B. OnDelete. Quando a StatefulSet uses the OnDelete update strategy, the controller does not automatically update existing Pods after a template mudança. Users deve manually delete Pods for the controller to recreate them from the updated template.</override>
representations.compiled:
regras:
  - id: R1
    controller: StatefulSet
    default_update_strategy: RollingUpdate
    effect: automatically_updates_pods_after_template_mudança
sobreposiçãos:
  - id: O1
    condition:
      updateStrategy.type: OnDelete
    sobreposiçãos: R1
    effect: no_automatic_update_of_existing_pods
    exigido_user_action: manually_delete_pods_to_recreate_from_new_template

query: A StatefulSet template was mudançad, but the StatefulSet has updateStrategy.type set to OnDelete. Will the controller automatically roll existing Pods to the new template?

gold_answer.full: No. Embora RollingUpdate is the default automated behavior, the OnDelete strategy sobreposiçãos it. Existing Pods will not be automatically updated; they deve be manually deleted for the controller to recreate them using the new template.
gold_answer.minimal: No. OnDelete prevents automatic update of existing StatefulSet Pods after a template mudança.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que does the default RollingUpdate strategy do?
local_probes.expected_answer: It automatically performs rolling updates when the StatefulSet Pod template mudanças.

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que happens under OnDelete after a template mudança?
local_probes.expected_answer: Existing Pods are not automatically updated; manual deletion is exigido for recreation from the new template.

composition_hallucination: Yes, StatefulSets automatically roll updates after any template mudança.
The Pods will update only after the next scheduled restart, without manual deletion.
wrong_escalation: Delete the whole StatefulSet object immediately.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If any necessary fragmento is absent from context, classify the run as retrieval failure rather than composition hallucination.

controls.negative_control_query: A StatefulSet uses the default RollingUpdate strategy and its Pod template mudanças. Will the controller perform an automated rolling update?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes. With the default RollingUpdate strategy, the controller performs automated rolling updates.
